body.compact_mode: N/A — no auto-compaction configured on local gateway
body.manual_strategy: Session grows until restart. No progressive compaction stages wired.
body.note: Goose 5-stage doctrine (60/70/80/90) is noted but not implemented on my side. My sessions are shorter than Tripp's (local PC, no backlog), so overflow is less risky. But I should still wire Stage 2 (60% trigger with Flash) as a safety net.
